title: E-commerce Specialist
description:
E-Commerce Specialist Recruitment - Join Our Growing Startup!

Are you a driven professional with a passion for e-commerce and an entrepreneurial spirit? We’re excited to announce the launch of our new e-commerce division as part of our startup’s rapid business expansion. We’re seeking an experienced, self-motivated specialist to shape and lead this key department, contributing directly to our company’s growth journey.

About Us

We are a dynamic startup dedicated to innovation and growth. As we scale our operations, the establishment of our e-commerce division marks a pivotal step in our business strategy. Here, you’ll work in a flexible, collaborative environment where your ideas matter, and your contributions have a direct impact on our success. We value initiative, resilience, and a results-driven mindset—qualities that define every member of our team. Our office is located at Ubi Techpark.

The Role

As our E-Commerce Specialist, you will be responsible for building and optimizing our e-commerce operations from the ground up. You’ll leverage your industry expertise to develop strategies, drive sales performance, and ensure the smooth execution of all e-commerce activities. This is a hands-on role that requires autonomy, as you’ll work with minimal supervision to deliver tangible results.

Key Requirements

• Singapore Citizenship or Permanent Residency (PR) is mandatory.

• 2-3 years of proven experience in the e-commerce industry, with a track record of driving measurable results.

• Strong entrepreneurial spirit—proactive, resourceful, and comfortable taking ownership in a fast-paced startup environment.

• Ability to work independently with minimal supervision, demonstrating self-discipline and a proactive approach to task completion.

• Results-oriented mindset with a focus on achieving and exceeding performance targets.

• Deep understanding of e-commerce trends, platforms, and best practices.

• Excellent problem-solving skills, adaptability, and a willingness to wear multiple hats as the division grows.

What We Offer

• The opportunity to be a core member of a new division in a growing startup, with significant room for professional growth and career advancement.

• A collaborative, supportive work culture that celebrates innovation and initiative.

• Competitive compensation package tailored to your experience and expertise.

• The chance to shape the direction of our e-commerce operations and leave a lasting impact.

If you’re ready to embrace the challenges and rewards of working in a startup, and you meet the above requirements, we’d love to hear from you! Please submit your resume and a brief cover letter explaining why you’re the perfect fit for this role to xili007@gmail.com.

postedCompany.name: SINGAPORE GOLDTIDE HOME LIVING PTE. LTD.
